title: PDF Page 3
content:
Duncan Engineering Dept. 
RFQ - OS 
Page 3 of 6 
1.  Purpose: 
 
Duncan Aviation requests TCCA design approval for deviation  to the Nextant STC design data related to 
a Starlink system installation. The deviation will be the mounting location for the Wireless Access Point 
(WAP). Wiring to the WAP will also deviate from the original STC design data.  
 
 FAA STC: ST11850CH   Installation of SpaceX Starlink Aviation System 
 TCCA STC: SA25-67   Installation of SpaceX Starlink Aviation System 
 
2. Aircraft Information:  
 
Registration: C-GKCP 
Make: Bombardier Inc. 
Model: CL-600-2B16 
Serial #: 5945 
Aircraft Work Location: Lincoln, NE, USA 
 
3. Work Scope Summary: 
 
• Deviation to WAP component location. STC design mounts the WAP on the outboard wall of a cabinet aft 
of the divan. This aircraft will not accommodate that location. A new location will be used in the RH FWD 
lower sidewall.  
• Supplemental continued airworthiness document for the deviations (ICA). 
• TPED Tolerance/WiFi activation will be embodied in accordance with Liberty Partners Part 25 AML STC 
STl1071SC. This is not part of the Elisen STC effort. 
• No deviations to antenna installation design, primary structural elements or changes to airworthiness 
limitations are anticipated. 
• Functional and EMI/RFI testing will be completed using TCCA STC SA25-67 test procedures

4. Total Customer Work Scope: 
 
This is the work scope as presented to the customer: 
 
 
  
5. Risks & Concerns 
 
There may be a deviation at the galley disconnect (pin number) or possibly a slight deviation with the CB 
location. I mention this as a "just in case" we may need to do a drawing or EO defining anything small that 
doesn't match the STC. 
 
6. Major Milestones: 
 
Tentative schedule: 
 
Activity Target Completion Date 
FAA STC Issued FEB 17, 2025 
TCCA STC Issued SEP 18, 2025 
PO Issued to Elisen SEP 4, 2025 
Data Generation Begin OCT 1, 2025 
Aircraft Input into LNK OCT 13, 2025 
System Installation Begin OCT 13, 2025 
Final Data Submittal to Elisen NOV 14, 2025 
Functional Ground Testing per Original STC NOV 21, 2025 
EMI/RFI Testing per Original STC NOV 21, 2025 
TCCA STC Issued NOV 24, 2025 
Aircraft Leaves LNK NOV 25, 2025
